description:
Operating Area: Adriatic Sea, Croatia

True to Sunseeker’s style, ARAGO displays the perfect balance of elegance, luxury, and adventure. Built in 2009 and extensively refitted in 2022, with a light refit before the summer of 2024, she remains in mint condition. Her sleek navy and white exterior embodies timeless sophistication, while her spacious and beautifully appointed interior ensures ultimate comfort.
Accommodating up to 10 guests in five en-suite cabins, including a Master suite on the main deck, two VIP cabins, and two convertible twin cabins, ARAGO is ideal for families or groups seeking a seamless charter experience.
The expansive sundeck is the heart of the yacht, featuring a Jacuzzi, large sunbathing pads, a bar, and an elegant dining area, perfect for alfresco meals while enjoying breathtaking views.
Designed for smooth cruising, ARAGO is equipped with stabilizers both underway and at anchor, ensuring maximum comfort. Adventure awaits with an impressive selection of water toys, including two brand-new 2024 Jet Ski Sea-Doos, two Seabob F5S etc. guaranteeing fun for guests of all ages.
With her unmistakable Sunseeker styling, high-performance capabilities, and luxurious amenities, ARAGO is the ultimate charter yacht for exploring the Adriatic in style.

blueprint.name: ARAGO

toys.label: Seabob F5S (NEW) LUMEX ORANGE / BLACK LINE ORANGE

tenders: 1 x Chase Boat Marlin 790 WITH OUTBOARD HONDA 250HP

crew.name: Vicko Ruic
crew.bio:
Croatian

Captain Vicko is a highly experienced professional with 19 years in the yachting industry. With a strong background in charter operations, he has successfully managed yachts ranging from 20 to 37 meters, ensuring top-tier guest experiences. A graduate of the Maritime University in Split, he has extensive expertise in yacht management and delivering seamless charters. His hands-on approach and commitment to guest satisfaction ensure that every charter runs smoothly, creating unforgettable moments for his guests. He is fluent in English, proficient in German, and has a conversational understanding of Italian.

crew.name: Zoran Miljevic
crew.bio:
Croatian

With over 13 years of culinary experience in some of Croatia and Italy’s finest kitchens, Chef Zoran brings a world-class dining experience to the guests of ARAGO. His impressive career includes time at Michelin-starred restaurants such as Mano and Nebo in Croatia, where he honed his skills as Junior Sous Chef and Chef de Partie. He also broadened his expertise with time spent working in distinguished restaurants across Italy. A graduate of the Italian Culinary Institute, Chef Zoran holds a Master in Italian Cuisine and infuses every dish with authenticity, creativity, and refined technique. Fluent in English and Italian, Zoran combines culinary excellence with a warm, personal touch tocreate unforgettable dining at sea.

crew.name: Josipa Zupanjac
crew.bio:
Croatian

Josipa is a highly skilled stewardess with over eight years of experience delivering exceptional 
service aboard luxury superyachts up to 60 meters, including M/Y SARASTAR and M/Y LADY 
HAYA. Specializing in event management and personalized guest care, she brings meticulous 
attention to detail and a proactive, can-do attitude to every aspect of her role. With a background 
in event planning and a passion for creating unforgettable experiences, Josipa brings warmth, 
professionalism, anda hands-on approach to everything she does. Josipa loves anticipating 
needs before they’re even spoken—and takes pride in making every moment on board feel 
effortless and refined. She is fluent in English and Italian, and speaks intermediate Spanish.

crew.name: Nikolina Ancic
crew.bio:
Croatian

Nikolina is a dedicated and self-motivated professional with diverse experience as a multi-skilled 
crew member aboard motor yachts. Her strong work ethic and adaptability have consistently 
driven her to achieve her goals, earning recognition for her attention to detail and exceptional 
service standards. Committed to delivering a superior guest experience, Nikolina excels in fast-paced environments and always strives to support and uplift the team. She brings a passion for 
hospitality and a focus on excellence to every aspect of her role

crew.name: Ljubo Toplak Katunaric
crew.bio:
Croatian

Ljubo brings knowledge in engineering and shipbuilding, backed by his technical education and 
years of hands-on experience. Hehandles demanding situations with calm precision and quick 
decision-making, ensuring all systems function flawlessly. Friendly, professional, and highly 
reliable, Ljubo plays a very important role in creating a safe and smooth charter experience.

crew.name: Mario Zelembaba
crew.bio:
Croatian

Mario is a responsible, dedicated, and solution-focused deckhand with a background in ship 
mechanics and hands-on experience at sea. Originally from Split, Croatia, he brings a proactive 
attitude and a strong sense of responsibility to every task on board. A true team player, Mario is 
always ready to lend a hand and takes pride in maintaining high standards across all deck operations.
